{
  "contents": "# LLM Chat History\n\nA VS Code extension that automatically saves your LLM chat history to Markdown files. Perfect for tracking AI conversations, building knowledge bases, and maintaining conversation archives.\n\n> ⚠️ **IMPORTANT COMPATIBILITY NOTICE**\n> \n> **Currently Tested Environment:**\n> - ✅ **Platform**: Windows 10/11\n> - ✅ **Application**: Cursor IDE (specific version tested)\n> - ❌ **NOT tested on**: macOS, Linux, standard VS Code, other Cursor versions\n> \n> **This is a beta version.** The extension is specifically designed for Cursor IDE and may not work with:\n> - Standard VS Code\n> - Other AI coding assistants (Cline, Continue, etc.)\n> - macOS or Linux systems (untested)\n> \n> Please verify compatibility before installing. We are actively working on broader support.\n\n## Features\n\n- ✅ **Automatic Monitoring**: Watches Cursor's database for changes\n- ✅ **Complete History**: Captures user messages, AI responses, and thinking processes\n- ✅ **Markdown Format**: Saves conversations in readable, version-control-friendly Markdown\n- ✅ **Timestamped Files**: Organizes files by date and conversation title\n- ✅ **Git Friendly**: Perfect for tracking AI conversations over time\n- ✅ **Multi-language**: UI and exported Markdown support English and Chinese\n\n## Installation\n\n### ⚠️ Before Installing\n\n**Please read the compatibility notice at the top of this page!**\n\nThis extension is currently in **beta** and only tested on:\n- ✅ Windows 10/11 + Cursor IDE\n\nIf you're using a different setup, it may not work correctly.\n\n### From VS Code Marketplace\n\n1. **Verify** you're using Cursor IDE on Windows\n2. Open Cursor\n3. Go to Extensions (Ctrl+Shift+X)\n4. Search for \"LLM Chat History\"\n5. Click Install\n\nThe extension will automatically configure itself upon installation.\n\n> **Note**: This extension uses `better-sqlite3`, a native module. The installation script automatically handles downloading the correct prebuilt binaries for Electron. If you encounter installation issues, run `npm run setup` manually.\n\n### From VSIX\n\n1. Download the `.vsix` file from releases\n2. In VS Code, go to Extensions view\n3. Click the `...` menu and select \"Install from VSIX...\"\n4. Select the downloaded file\n\n## Usage\n\nThe extension activates automatically when you open a workspace in Cursor.\n\n### Automatic Saving\n\nBy default, the extension automatically monitors your LLM chat history and saves it to `.llm-chat-history/history/` in your workspace root.\n\n### Manual Save\n\nYou can manually trigger a save by:\n1. Opening the Command Palette (Ctrl+Shift+P / Cmd+Shift+P)\n2. Running the command: \"LLMChatHistory: Save Chat History Now\"\n\n### Viewing History\n\nThe generated Markdown files are optimized for direct viewing:\n\n- **VS Code**: Open `.md` files directly with full Markdown preview support\n- **GitHub**: View with rich formatting and collapsible sections\n- **Obsidian/Notion**: Import for knowledge management\n- **Any Markdown Editor**: Standard Markdown with enhanced readability\n\n## Configuration\n\nConfigure the extension in your VS Code settings:\n\n```json\n{\n  \"chatHistory.autoSave\": true,\n  \"chatHistory.outputDirectory\": \".llm-chat-history/history\",\n  \"chatHistory.useUTC\": true,\n  \"chatHistory.locale\": \"auto\"\n}\n```\n\n### Settings\n\n- `chatHistory.autoSave` (default: `true`): Enable automatic saving of chat history\n- `chatHistory.outputDirectory` (default: `.llm-chat-history/history`): Directory to save history files\n- `chatHistory.useUTC` (default: `true`): Use UTC timezone for timestamps\n- `chatHistory.locale` (default: `auto`): Language for UI/Markdown (`auto`, `en`, `zh`)\n\n## Output Format\n\nConversations are saved as beautifully formatted Markdown files:\n\n```markdown\n# Conversation Title\n\n**Created**: 2025-12-23 10:30Z\n**Messages**: 4 (User: 2, Assistant: 2)\n**Session ID**: `abc-123`\n\n---\n\n## 💬 User #1\n\n_2025-12-23 10:30Z_\n\nUser's question here\n\n---\n\n## 🤖 Assistant #1 (claude-4.5-sonnet, Agent)\n\n_2025-12-23 10:31Z_\n\n<details>\n<summary><strong>💭 Thinking Process</strong></summary>\n\n> AI's internal thinking process\n> appears as a blockquote for easy reading\n\n</details>\n\nAI's response here\n\n**🔧 Tool Uses** (2)\n\n<details>\n<summary>🔍 **grep** — Grep for \"pattern\" in \"path\" • 5 matches</summary>\n\n**Args**\n\n```json\n{\n  \"pattern\": \"search term\",\n  \"path\": \"src/\"\n}\n```\n\n**Result**\n\n```json\n{\n  \"matches\": 5\n}\n```\n\n</details>\n\n---\n```\n\n### Key Features\n\n- ✨ **Clear Structure**: Hierarchical headings with emoji indicators\n- 📊 **Metadata**: Session info, message counts, timestamps\n- 💭 **Collapsible Sections**: Thinking processes and tool results fold away\n- 🎨 **Icon System**: Visual indicators for users (💬), assistants (🤖), tools (🔧), etc.\n- 📝 **Readable**: Optimized for direct viewing in any Markdown renderer\n- 🌐 **Bilingual**: All labels automatically localized to English or Chinese\n\n### File Naming\n\nFiles are named with the pattern: `YYYY-MM-DD_HH-MMZ-{title}.md`\n\nExample: `2025-12-23_10-30Z-implementing-chat-history.md`\n\n## System Requirements\n\n### ✅ Tested & Supported\n- **OS**: Windows 10/11\n- **Application**: Cursor IDE\n- **VS Code Version**: 1.93.0 or higher\n\n### ⚠️ Untested (Use at Your Own Risk)\n- macOS\n- Linux\n- Standard VS Code (without Cursor)\n- Other AI coding assistants (Cline, Continue, GitHub Copilot Chat, etc.)\n\n### Prerequisites\n- Active Cursor installation with chat history\n- Workspace folder must be open\n\n## Database Location\n\nThe extension reads from Cursor's SQLite database:\n\n- **Windows**: `%APPDATA%\\Roaming\\Cursor\\User\\globalStorage\\state.vscdb`\n- **macOS**: `~/Library/Application Support/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb`\n- **Linux**: `~/.config/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb`\n\n## Known Issues\n\n- The extension requires a workspace to be open\n- Database must be accessible (not locked by another process)\n- **Windows**: Native module installation is handled automatically\n\n## Roadmap\n\nWe are continuously improving this extension. Upcoming features include:\n\n### 🚀 Coming Soon\n- ☁️ **Cloud Sync**: Sync your chat history across all devices\n- 👥 **Team Collaboration**: Share and collaborate on conversations\n- 📊 **Advanced Analytics**: Insights and statistics about your AI usage\n- 🔍 **Advanced Search**: Full-text search across all conversations\n- 🏷️ **Tags & Organization**: Better ways to organize your history\n- 📤 **Export Options**: PDF, HTML, and more export formats\n\n## Pricing\n\n### Free Version (Current)\n- ✅ Unlimited local chat history saving\n- ✅ Markdown export\n- ✅ Multi-language support\n- ✅ Auto-save functionality\n\n### Pro Version (Coming Soon)\n- ☁️ Cloud sync across devices\n- 👥 Team collaboration features\n- 📊 Advanced analytics\n- 🎯 Priority support\n- 🔄 Auto-backup\n\nStay tuned for updates!\n\n## License\n\nThis software is proprietary and confidential. Unauthorized copying, distribution, \nmodification, or use is strictly prohibited.\n\n**Copyright (c) 2025 ClarkZhang (Solo). All rights reserved.**\n\n## Support\n\nNeed help or have feedback?\n\n- 📧 **Email**: 857867503@qq.com\n- 🌐 **GitHub**: https://github.com/Clark-zhang\n- 💬 **Feedback**: We'd love to hear from you!\n\n---\n\n**Note**: This extension is not officially affiliated with Cursor or Anysphere.\n\n\n",

{
  "contents": "/**\n * 扩展主入口文件\n */\n\nimport * as vscode from 'vscode';\nimport * as path from 'path';\nimport * as fs from 'fs';\nimport { DatabaseWatcher } from './database-watcher';\nimport { createTranslator } from './i18n';\n\n/**\n * 扩展激活时调用\n */\nexport function activate(context: vscode.ExtensionContext) {\n    console.log('LLM Chat History Extension activated');\n    \n    // 获取配置\n    const config = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory');\n    const autoSave = config.get<boolean>('autoSave', true);\n    const localeSetting = config.get<string>('locale', 'auto') as any;\n    const t = createTranslator(localeSetting);\n    \n    if (!autoSave) {\n        console.log('Auto-save disabled');\n        return;\n    }\n    \n    // 获取数据库路径\n    const dbPath = getCursorDatabasePath();\n    \n    // 检查数据库是否存在\n    if (!fs.existsSync(dbPath)) {\n        console.warn('Cursor database not found:', dbPath);\n        vscode.window.showWarningMessage(\n            t('warning.dbNotFound')\n        );\n        return;\n    }\n    \n    // 检查是否有打开的工作区\n    if (!vscode.workspace.workspaceFolders || vscode.workspace.workspaceFolders.length === 0) {\n        console.warn('No workspace folder open');\n        return;\n    }\n    \n    // 工作区路径（使用第一个工作区）\n    const workspaceRoot = vscode.workspace.workspaceFolders?.[0]?.uri.fsPath;\n    if (!workspaceRoot) {\n        console.warn('No workspace folder path resolved');\n        return;\n    }\n\n    // 启动监听\n    const watcher = new DatabaseWatcher(dbPath, workspaceRoot, localeSetting);\n    watcher.start();\n    \n    // 注册命令：手动保存\n    const saveCommand = vscode.commands.registerCommand(\n        'chatHistory.saveNow',\n        () => {\n            watcher.syncNow();\n            vscode.window.showInformationMessage(t('info.saved'));\n        }\n    );\n    \n    context.subscriptions.push(saveCommand, {\n        dispose: () => watcher.stop()\n    });\n    \n    console.log('LLM Chat History Extension ready');\n}\n\n/**\n * 扩展停用时调用\n */\nexport function deactivate() {\n    console.log('LLM Chat History Extension deactivated');\n}\n\n/**\n * 获取 Cursor 数据库路径\n */\nfunction getCursorDatabasePath(): string {\n    const platform = process.platform;\n    const homeDir = process.env.HOME || process.env.USERPROFILE || '';\n    \n    if (platform === 'win32') {\n        return path.join(\n            homeDir,\n            'AppData/Roaming/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb'\n        );\n    } else if (platform === 'darwin') {\n        return path.join(\n            homeDir,\n            'Library/Application Support/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb'\n        );\n    } else {\n        // Linux\n        return path.join(\n            homeDir,\n            '.config/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb'\n        );\n    }\n}\n\n\n",

{
  "contents": "/**\r\n * 数据库读取器\r\n * 负责从 Cursor SQLite 数据库读取对话数据\r\n */\r\n\r\nimport Database from 'better-sqlite3';\r\nimport { ComposerData, Bubble, DatabaseRow } from './types';\r\n\r\nexport class CursorDatabaseReader {\r\n    private db: Database.Database;\r\n    \r\n    constructor(dbPath: string) {\r\n        // 只读模式 + WAL 模式\r\n        this.db = new Database(dbPath, {\r\n            readonly: true,\r\n            fileMustExist: true\r\n        });\r\n        \r\n        // 设置 WAL 模式\r\n        this.db.pragma('journal_mode = WAL');\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 获取所有 Composer\r\n     */\r\n    getAllComposers(): ComposerData[] {\r\n        const stmt = this.db.prepare(`\r\n            SELECT key, value \r\n            FROM cursorDiskKV \r\n            WHERE key LIKE 'composerData:%'\r\n        `);\r\n        \r\n        const rows = stmt.all() as DatabaseRow[];\r\n        const composers: ComposerData[] = [];\r\n        \r\n        for (const row of rows) {\r\n            try {\r\n                // 值可能是 Buffer 或字符串\r\n                const valueStr = typeof row.value === 'string' \r\n                    ? row.value \r\n                    : row.value.toString('utf-8');\r\n                const data = JSON.parse(valueStr) as ComposerData;\r\n                composers.push(data);\r\n            } catch (error) {\r\n                console.error('Failed to parse composer:', error);\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        return composers;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 获取指定 Composer 的所有 Bubble\r\n     */\r\n    getComposerBubbles(composerId: string, bubbleIds: string[]): Bubble[] {\r\n        const bubbles: Bubble[] = [];\r\n        \r\n        for (const bubbleId of bubbleIds) {\r\n            const key = `bubbleId:${composerId}:${bubbleId}`;\r\n            const stmt = this.db.prepare('SELECT value FROM cursorDiskKV WHERE key = ?');\r\n            const row = stmt.get(key) as DatabaseRow | undefined;\r\n            \r\n            if (row && row.value) {\r\n                try {\r\n                    // 值可能是 Buffer 或字符串\r\n                    const valueStr = typeof row.value === 'string' \r\n                        ? row.value \r\n                        : row.value.toString('utf-8');\r\n                    const bubble = JSON.parse(valueStr) as Bubble;\r\n                    bubbles.push(bubble);\r\n                } catch (error) {\r\n                    console.error(`Failed to parse bubble ${bubbleId}:`, error);\r\n                }\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        return bubbles;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 关闭数据库连接\r\n     */\r\n    close(): void {\r\n        this.db.close();\r\n    }\r\n}\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * 带重试的数据库打开函数\r\n */\r\nexport async function openDatabase(dbPath: string, maxRetries = 3): Promise<CursorDatabaseReader> {\r\n    for (let i = 0; i < maxRetries; i++) {\r\n        try {\r\n            return new CursorDatabaseReader(dbPath);\r\n        } catch (error) {\r\n            if (i < maxRetries - 1) {\r\n                // 等待 500ms 后重试\r\n                await sleep(500);\r\n                continue;\r\n            }\r\n            throw error;\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n    throw new Error('Failed to open database after retries');\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction sleep(ms: number): Promise<void> {\r\n    return new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, ms));\r\n}\r\n\r\n\r\n",

}

> 1. 这是一个 VS Code 扩展，用于保存 Cursor IDE 的聊天记录到 Markdown 文件

  "contents": "/**\n * 类型定义文件\n * 基于 Cursor SQLite 数据库实际结构\n */\n\n/**\n * Composer Data - 对话容器\n */\nexport interface ComposerData {\n    _v: number;\n    composerId: string;\n    name: string;\n    createdAt: string;\n    lastUpdatedAt?: string;\n    \n    // 对话引用列表（关键！）\n    fullConversationHeadersOnly: Array<{\n        bubbleId: string;\n        type: number; // 1=用户消息, 2=AI响应\n    }>;\n    \n    // 其他元数据\n    text: string;\n    richText: string;\n    modelConfig: {\n        modelName: string;\n    };\n    unifiedMode: number; // 1=Chat, 2=Agent\n    isAgentic: boolean;\n}\n\n/**\n * 用户消息 Bubble (Type 1)\n */\nexport interface UserBubble {\n    _v: number;\n    type: 1;\n    bubbleId: string;\n    requestId: string;\n    createdAt: string;\n    \n    // 用户输入内容\n    text: string;\n    richText: string;\n    \n    // 上下文信息\n    modelInfo?: {\n        modelName: string;\n    };\n    unifiedMode?: number;\n    isAgentic?: boolean;\n    workspaceUris?: string[];\n    workspaceProjectDir?: string;\n}\n\n/**\n * AI 响应 Bubble (Type 2)\n */\nexport interface AIResponseBubble {\n    _v: number;\n    type: 2;\n    bubbleId: string;\n    requestId: string;\n    createdAt: string;\n    capabilityType?: number;\n    \n    // AI 响应内容\n    text: string;\n    \n    // AI 思考过程（thinking models）\n    thinking?: {\n        text: string;\n        signature: string;\n    };\n    thinkingStyle?: number;\n    \n    // 时间信息\n    timingInfo?: {\n        clientStartTime: number;\n        clientRpcSendTime: number;\n        clientSettleTime: number;\n        clientEndTime: number;\n    };\n    \n    // 模型信息\n    modelInfo?: {\n        modelName: string;\n    };\n    \n    // 工具调用结果\n    toolResults?: Array<{\n        name: string;\n        result: any;\n    }>;\n    \n    // 工具调用（capabilityType === 15）\n    toolFormerData?: ToolFormerData | null;\n    \n    unifiedMode?: number;\n    isAgentic?: boolean;\n    workspaceUris?: string[];\n    workspaceProjectDir?: string;\n}\n\n/**\n * Bubble 联合类型\n */\nexport type Bubble = UserBubble | AIResponseBubble;\n\n/**\n * 消息结构（用于 Markdown 生成）\n */\nexport interface Message {\n    id: string;\n    type: 'user' | 'assistant';\n    text: string;\n    thinking?: string;\n    timestamp: string;\n    modelName?: string;\n    mode?: string;\n    toolResults?: Array<{\n        name: string;\n        result: any;\n    }>;\n    toolUses?: ToolUseBlock[];\n}\n\n/**\n * 数据库行结构\n */\nexport interface DatabaseRow {\n    key: string;\n    value: any; // BLOB or TEXT\n}\n\n/**\n * Cursor 工具调用原始数据\n */\nexport interface ToolFormerData {\n    name: string;\n    tool: string;\n    toolCallId: string;\n    toolIndex: number;\n    modelCallId?: string;\n    status?: string;\n    rawArgs?: string;\n    params?: any;\n    result?: string;\n    additionalData?: any;\n}\n\nexport interface ToolUseBlock {\n    name: string;\n    markdown: string;\n}\n\n\n",

{
  "contents": "/**\n * 对话数据重组器\n * 将 Composer 和 Bubble 数据转换为统一的消息格式\n */\n\nimport { ComposerData, Bubble, Message, AIResponseBubble, ToolUseBlock } from './types';\nimport { formatToolUse } from './tool-use-formatter';\nimport { Translator } from './i18n';\n\nexport class ConversationBuilder {\n    constructor(private t: Translator) {}\n\n    /**\n     * 从 Composer 构建完整对话\n     */\n    buildConversation(\n        composer: ComposerData,\n        bubbles: Bubble[]\n    ): Message[] {\n        const messages: Message[] = [];\n        const bubbleMap = new Map<string, Bubble>();\n        \n        // 创建 bubble 映射\n        for (const bubble of bubbles) {\n            bubbleMap.set(bubble.bubbleId, bubble);\n        }\n        \n        // 按顺序处理\n        const headers = composer.fullConversationHeadersOnly || [];\n        \n        for (const header of headers) {\n            const bubble = bubbleMap.get(header.bubbleId);\n            if (!bubble) continue;\n            \n            if (header.type === 1 && bubble.type === 1) {\n                // 用户消息\n                messages.push({\n                    id: bubble.bubbleId,\n                    type: 'user',\n                    text: bubble.text || '',\n                    timestamp: bubble.createdAt,\n                    modelName: bubble.modelInfo?.modelName,\n                    mode: this.getMode(bubble.unifiedMode)\n                });\n            } else if (header.type === 2 && bubble.type === 2) {\n                // AI 响应\n                const toolUse = this.extractToolUse(bubble);\n                const toolUses: ToolUseBlock[] | undefined = toolUse ? [toolUse] : undefined;\n\n                messages.push({\n                    id: bubble.bubbleId,\n                    type: 'assistant',\n                    text: bubble.text || '',\n                    thinking: bubble.thinking?.text,\n                    timestamp: bubble.createdAt,\n                    modelName: bubble.modelInfo?.modelName,\n                    mode: this.getMode(bubble.unifiedMode),\n                    toolResults: bubble.toolResults,\n                    toolUses\n                });\n            }\n        }\n        \n        return messages;\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 获取模式名称\n     */\n    private getMode(unifiedMode?: number): string {\n        switch (unifiedMode) {\n            case 1: return this.t('mode.chat');\n            case 2: return this.t('mode.agent');\n            default: return '';\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 提取工具调用 Markdown\n     */\n    private extractToolUse(bubble: AIResponseBubble): ToolUseBlock | null {\n        // Cursor 工具调用 capabilityType 为 15\n        if (bubble.capabilityType !== 15) {\n            return null;\n        }\n        return formatToolUse(bubble.toolFormerData, this.t);\n    }\n}\n\n\n",
  "numCharactersInRequestedRange": 2719,
  "totalLinesInFile": 91
}

  "contents": "/**\n * Cline 数据读取器\n * 负责从 Cline 扩展的任务文件夹读取对话数据\n */\n\nimport * as fs from 'fs';\nimport * as path from 'path';\nimport { \n    ClineTask, \n    ClineApiConversationHistory, \n    ClineMessage, \n    ClineMessageContent,\n    Message \n} from './types';\nimport { Translator } from './i18n';\n\nexport class ClineDataReader {\n    private clineDir: string;\n    \n    constructor(\n        private workspaceRoot: string,\n        private t: Translator\n    ) {\n        this.clineDir = path.join(workspaceRoot, '.cline');\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 检查 Cline 目录是否存在\n     */\n    exists(): boolean {\n        return fs.existsSync(this.clineDir) && fs.statSync(this.clineDir).isDirectory();\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 获取所有任务\n     */\n    getAllTasks(): Array<{ taskDir: string; task: ClineTask; messages: Message[] }> {\n        if (!this.exists()) {\n            return [];\n        }\n        \n        const result: Array<{ taskDir: string; task: ClineTask; messages: Message[] }> = [];\n        \n        try {\n            const entries = fs.readdirSync(this.clineDir, { withFileTypes: true });\n            \n            for (const entry of entries) {\n                if (!entry.isDirectory()) continue;\n                \n                const taskDir = path.join(this.clineDir, entry.name);\n                const taskData = this.readTask(taskDir);\n                \n                if (taskData) {\n                    result.push(taskData);\n                }\n            }\n            \n            // 按时间戳排序（最新的在前）\n            result.sort((a, b) => b.task.ts - a.task.ts);\n            \n        } catch (error) {\n            console.error('Failed to read Cline tasks:', error);\n        }\n        \n        return result;\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 读取单个任务\n     */\n    private readTask(taskDir: string): { taskDir: string; task: ClineTask; messages: Message[] } | null {\n        try {\n            // 读取任务元数据\n            const taskJsonPath = path.join(taskDir, 'task.json');\n            if (!fs.existsSync(taskJsonPath)) {\n                return null;\n            }\n            \n            const taskJson = fs.readFileSync(taskJsonPath, 'utf-8');\n            const task: ClineTask = JSON.parse(taskJson);\n            \n            // 读取对话历史\n            const apiHistoryPath = path.join(taskDir, 'api_conversation_history.json');\n            if (!fs.existsSync(apiHistoryPath)) {\n                return null;\n            }\n            \n            const historyJson = fs.readFileSync(apiHistoryPath, 'utf-8');\n            const history: ClineApiConversationHistory = JSON.parse(historyJson);\n            \n            // 转换为统一的消息格式\n            const messages = this.convertToMessages(history.messages, task);\n            \n            return { taskDir, task, messages };\n            \n        } catch (error) {\n            console.error(`Failed to read task from ${taskDir}:`, error);\n            return null;\n        }\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 将 Cline 消息转换为统一格式\n     */\n    private convertToMessages(clineMessages: ClineMessage[], task: ClineTask): Message[] {\n        const messages: Message[] = [];\n        let messageIndex = 0;\n        \n        for (const msg of clineMessages) {\n            messageIndex++;\n            \n            if (msg.role === 'user') {\n                // 用户消息\n                const textContent = this.extractTextFromContent(msg.content);\n                messages.push({\n                    id: `${task.id}-user-${messageIndex}`,\n                    type: 'user',\n                    text: textContent,\n                    timestamp: msg.ts ? new Date(msg.ts).toISOString() : new Date(task.ts).toISOString()\n                });\n                \n            } else if (msg.role === 'assistant') {\n                // AI 响应\n                const textParts: string[] = [];\n                const toolUses: Array<{ name: string; markdown: string }> = [];\n                \n                for (const content of msg.content) {\n                    if (content.type === 'text') {\n                        textParts.push(content.text);\n                    } else if (content.type === 'tool_use') {\n                        // 提取工具使用信息\n                        const toolMd = this.formatToolUse(content);\n                        toolUses.push({\n                            name: content.name,\n                            markdown: toolMd\n                        });\n                    }\n                }\n                \n                messages.push({\n                    id: `${task.id}-assistant-${messageIndex}`,\n                    type: 'assistant',\n                    text: textParts.join('\\n\\n'),\n                    timestamp: msg.ts ? new Date(msg.ts).toISOString() : new Date(task.ts).toISOString(),\n                    toolUses: toolUses.length > 0 ? toolUses : undefined\n                });\n            }\n        }\n        \n        return messages;\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 从内容数组中提取文本\n     */\n    private extractTextFromContent(content: ClineMessageContent[]): string {\n        const textParts: string[] = [];\n        \n        for (const item of content) {\n            if (item.type === 'text') {\n                textParts.push(item.text);\n            } else if (item.type === 'image') {\n                textParts.push('[Image]');\n            }\n        }\n        \n        return textParts.join('\\n\\n');\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 格式化工具使用为 Markdown\n     */\n    private formatToolUse(toolUse: Extract<ClineMessageContent, { type: 'tool_use' }>): string {\n        const lines: string[] = [];\n        \n        lines.push(`**${this.t('tool.name')}**: ${toolUse.name}`);\n        lines.push('');\n        lines.push(`**${this.t('tool.args')}**`);\n        lines.push('```json');\n        lines.push(JSON.stringify(toolUse.input, null, 2));\n        lines.push('```');\n        \n        return lines.join('\\n');\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 获取任务的最后修改时间\n     */\n    getTaskLastModified(taskDir: string): Date | null {\n        try {\n            const apiHistoryPath = path.join(taskDir, 'api_conversation_history.json');\n            if (fs.existsSync(apiHistoryPath)) {\n                const stats = fs.statSync(apiHistoryPath);\n                return stats.mtime;\n            }\n        } catch (error) {\n            console.error('Failed to get task last modified:', error);\n        }\n        return null;\n    }\n}\n\n"
}

workspaceRoot;\n        this.workspaceFilter = new WorkspaceFilter(workspaceRoot);\n        this.t = createTranslator(localeSetting);\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 启动监听\n     */\n    start(): void {\n        // 1. 立即执行一次同步\n        this.syncNow();\n        \n        // 2. 监听数据库文件变化\n        this.watcher = chokidar.watch(this.dbPath, {\n            persistent: true,\n            ignoreInitial: true\n        });\n        \n        this.watcher.on('change', () => {\n            this.scheduleSync();\n        });\n        \n        // 3. 定时轮询（兜底，每 2 分钟）\n        setInterval(() => {\n            this.syncNow();\n        }, 120000); // 2 分钟\n        \n        console.log('Database watcher started');\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 停止监听\n     */\n    stop(): void {\n        if (this.watcher) {\n            this.watcher.close();\n        }\n        if (this.debounceTimer) {\n            clearTimeout(this.debounceTimer);\n        }\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 调度同步（防抖）\n     */\n    private scheduleSync(): void {\n        // 防抖：2 秒内只执行一次\n        if (this.debounceTimer) {\n            clearTimeout(this.debounceTimer);\n        }\n        \n        this.debounceTimer = setTimeout(() => {\n            this.syncNow();\n        }, 2000);\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 立即同步\n     */\n    syncNow(): void {\n        const now = Date.now();\n        \n        // 避免过于频繁的同步\n        if (now - this.lastSync < 1000) {\n            return;\n        }\n        \n        this.lastSync = now;\n        \n        this.performSync().catch(error => {\n            console.error('Sync failed:', error);\n        });\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 执行同步\n     */\n    private async performSync(): Promise<void> {\n        const reader = new CursorDatabaseReader(this.dbPath);\n        \n        try {\n            // 获取所有 composer\n            const composers = reader.getAllComposers();\n            \n            console.log(`Found ${composers.length} composers`);\n            \n            for (const composer of composers) {\n                // 只处理属于当前工作区的对话\n                const belongsToWorkspace = this.workspaceFilter.belongsToCurrentWorkspace(\n                    composer,\n                    reader\n                );\n                if (!belongsToWorkspace) {\n                    continue;\n                }\n\n                // 获取 bubble IDs\n                const bubbleIds = (composer.fullConversationHeadersOnly || [])\n                    .map(h => h.bubbleId);\n                \n                if (bubbleIds.length === 0) continue;\n                \n                // 获取 bubbles\n                const bubbles = reader.getComposerBubbles(composer.composerId, bubbleIds);\n                \n                // 构建对话\n                const builder = new ConversationBuilder(this.t);\n                const messages = builder.buildConversation(composer, bubbles);\n                \n                if (messages.length === 0) continue;\n                \n                // 生成 Markdown\n                const generator = new MarkdownGenerator(this.t);\n                const markdown = generator.generate(composer, messages);\n                \n                // 保存\n                const config = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory');\n                const outputDir = config.get<string>('outputDirectory', '.llm-chat-history');\n                \n                const saver = new HistorySaver(this.workspaceRoot, outputDir);\n                await saver.save(composer, markdown);\n            }\n        } finally {\n            reader.close();\n        }\n    }\n}\n\n\n",

{
  "contents": "/**\n * 历史记录保存器\n * 负责将 Markdown 内容保存到文件系统\n */\n\nimport * as fs from 'fs/promises';\nimport * as path from 'path';\nimport { ComposerData } from './types';\n\nexport class HistorySaver {\n    private historyDir: string;\n    \n    constructor(workspaceRoot: string, outputDir: string = '.llm-chat-history/history') {\n        this.historyDir = path.join(workspaceRoot, outputDir);\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 保存对话到文件\n     */\n    async save(composer: ComposerData, markdown: string): Promise<string> {\n        // 确保目录存在\n        await fs.mkdir(this.historyDir, { recursive: true });\n        \n        // 生成文件名\n        const filename = this.generateFilename(composer);\n        const filepath = path.join(this.historyDir, filename);\n        \n        // 检查是否需要更新\n        const shouldSave = await this.shouldSave(filepath, markdown);\n        \n        if (shouldSave) {\n            await fs.writeFile(filepath, markdown, 'utf-8');\n            console.log(`Saved: ${filename}`);\n        }\n        \n        return filepath;\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 生成文件名\n     */\n    private generateFilename(composer: ComposerData): string {\n        const date = new Date(composer.createdAt);\n        const year = date.getUTCFullYear();\n        const month = String(date.getUTCMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0');\n        const day = String(date.getUTCDate()).padStart(2, '0');\n        const hour = String(date.getUTCHours()).padStart(2, '0');\n        const minute = String(date.getUTCMinutes()).padStart(2, '0');\n        \n        const timestamp = `${year}-${month}-${day}_${hour}-${minute}Z`;\n        const title = this.sanitizeTitle(composer.name || 'untitled');\n        \n        return `${timestamp}-${title}.md`;\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 清理标题中的特殊字符\n     */\n    private sanitizeTitle(title: string): string {\n        // 移除特殊字符\n        return title\n            .replace(/[<>:\"/\\\\|?*]/g, '-')\n            .replace(/\\s+/g, '-')\n            .toLowerCase()\n            .substring(0, 50);\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 检查是否需要保存\n     */\n    private async shouldSave(filepath: string, newContent: string): Promise<boolean> {\n        try {\n            const existingContent = await fs.readFile(filepath, 'utf-8');\n            return existingContent !== newContent;\n        } catch {\n            // 文件不存在，需要保存\n            return true;\n        }\n    }\n}\n\n\n",

}

'./types';\n\nexport class ClineWatcher {\n    private watcher: chokidar.FSWatcher | null = null;\n    private lastSync: number = 0;\n    private debounceTimer: NodeJS.Timeout | null = null;\n outputDir: string = '.llm-chat-history/history',\n        localeSetting?: LocaleSetting\n    ) {\n        this.workspaceRoot = workspaceRoot;\n        this.outputDir = path.join(workspaceRoot,    // 检查 Cline 目录是否存在\n        if (!this.reader.exists()) {\n            console.log('Cline directory not found, creating it...');\n            // 不显示错误，因为用户可能还没使用过 Cline\n            return;\n        }\n        \n        // 1. 立即执行一次同步\n        this.syncNow();\n        \n        // 2. 监听 .cline 目录变化\n        const clineDir = path.join(this.workspaceRoot, '.cline');\n        this.watcher = this.watcher.close();\n        }\n        if (this.debounceTimer) {\n            clearTimeout(this.debounceTimer);\n        }\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 调度同步（防抖）\n     */\n    private {\n            this.syncNow();\n        }, 2000);\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 立即同步\n     */\n    syncNow(): void {\n        const now = Date.now();\n        \n        // 避免过于频繁的同步\n        if (now - error);\n        });\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 执行同步\n     */\n    private async performSync(): Promise<void> {\n        try {\n            // 获取所有任务\n            const tasks = (messages.length === 0) continue;\n                \n                // 生成 Markdown\n                const markdown = this.generateMarkdown(task, messages);\n                \n                // 保存\n                await this.save(task, markdown);\n            }\n        } catch (error) {\n            console.error('Failed to sync Cline tasks:', error);\n        }\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 生成 this.t('conversation.untitled')}`);\n        lines.push('');\n        \n        // 元数据\n        const createdAt = new Date(task.ts).toISOString();\n        lines.push(`**${this.t('conversation.created')}**: ${createdAt}`);\n        \n        const userCount = messages.filter(m => m.type === 'user').length;\n        const assistantCount = messages.filter(m => m.type === 'assistant').length;\n        lines.push(`**${this.t('conversation.messages')}**: ${messages.length} (${this.t('conversation.user')}: ${userCount}, ${this.t('conversation.assistant')}: ${assistantCount})`);\n        \n        lines.push(`**${this.t('conversation.taskId')}**: \\`${task.id}\\``);\n        lines.push(`**${this.t('conversation.cost')}**: $${task.totalCost.toFixed(4)}`);\n        lines.push(`**${this.t('conversation.tokens')}**: In: ${task.tokensIn}, Out: ${task.tokensOut}`);\n        lines.push('');\n        lines.push('---');\n        lines.push('');\n        \n        // 消息\n        let userIndex = 0;\n        let assistantIndex = 0;\n        \n        for (const msg of messages) {\n            if (msg.type === 'user') {\n                userIndex++;\n                lines.push(`## 💬 ${this.t('message.user')} #${userIndex}`);\n                lines.push('');\n                lines.push(`_${msg.timestamp}_`);\n                lines.push('');\n                lines.push(msg.text);\n                lines.push('');\n                lines.push('---');\n                lines.push('');\n            } else if (msg.type === 'assistant') {\n                assistantIndex++;\n                const modelLabel = msg.modelName ? ` (${msg.modelName})` : '';\n                lines.push(`## 🤖 ${this.t('message.assistant')} #${assistantIndex}${modelLabel}`);\n                lines.push('');\n                lines.push(`_${msg.timestamp}_`);\n                lines.push('');\n                \n                if (msg.text) {\n                    lines.push(msg.text);\n                    lines.push('');\n                }\n                \n                // 工具使用\n                if (msg.toolUses && msg.toolUses.length > 0) {\n                    lines.push(`**${this.t('tool.uses')}** (${msg.toolUses.length})`);\n                    lines.push('');\n                    \n                    for (const toolUse of msg.toolUses) {\n                        lines.push('<details>');\n                        lines.push(`<summary>🔧 **${toolUse.name}**</summary>`);\n                        lines.push('');\n                        lines.push(toolUse.markdown);\n                        lines.push('');\n                        lines.push('</details>');\n                        lines.push('');\n                    }\n                }\n                \n                lines.push('---');\n                lines.push('');\n            }\n        }\n        \n        return lines.join('\\n');\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 保存任务到文件\n     */\n    private async save(task: ClineTask, markdown: string): Promise<void> {\n        // 确保目录存在\n        await fs.mkdir(this.outputDir, { recursive: true });\n        \n        // 生成文件名\n        const filename = this.generateFilename(task);\n        const filepath = path.join(this.outputDir, filename);\n        \n        // 检查是否需要更新\n        const shouldSave = await this.shouldSave(filepath, markdown);\n        \n        if (shouldSave) {\n            await fs.writeFile(filepath, markdown, 'utf-8');\n            console.log(`Saved Cline task: ${filename}`);\n        }\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 生成文件名\n     */\n    private generateFilename(task: ClineTask): string {\n        const date = new Date(task.ts);\n        const year = date.getUTCFullYear();\n        const month = String(date.getUTCMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0');\n        const day = String(date.getUTCDate()).padStart(2, '0');\n        const hour = String(date.getUTCHours()).padStart(2, '0');\n        const minute = String(date.getUTCMinutes()).padStart(2, '0');\n        \n        const timestamp = `${year}-${month}-${day}_${hour}-${minute}Z`;\n        const title = this.sanitizeTitle(task.task || 'untitled');\n        \n        return `${timestamp}-cline-${title}.md`;\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 清理标题中的特殊字符\n     */\n    private sanitizeTitle(title: string): string {\n        return title\n            .replace(/[<>:\"/\\\\|?*]/g, '-')\n            .replace(/\\s+/g, '-')\n            .toLowerCase()\n            .substring(0, 50);\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 检查是否需要保存\n     */\n    private async shouldSave(filepath: string, newContent: string): Promise<boolean> {\n        try {\n            const existingContent = await fs.readFile(filepath, 'utf-8');\n            return existingContent !== newContent;\n        } catch {\n            // 文件不存在，需要保存\n            return true;\n        }\n    }\n}\n\n"

  "contentsAfterEdit": "/**\r\n * Cline 数据监听器\r\n * 监听 Cline 任务文件夹变化并自动同步\r\n */\r\n\r\nimport * as chokidar from 'chokidar';\r\nimport * as path from 'path';\r\nimport { ClineDataReader } from './cline-reader';\r\nimport { MarkdownGenerator } from './markdown-generator';\r\nimport { LocaleSetting, Translator, createTranslator } from './i18n';\r\nimport * as fs from 'fs/promises';\r\nimport { ClineTask } from './types';\r\n\r\nexport class ClineWatcher {\r\n    private watcher: chokidar.FSWatcher | null = null;\r\n    private lastSync: number = 0;\r\n    private debounceTimer: NodeJS.Timeout | null = null;\r\n    private workspaceRoot: string;\r\n    private outputDir: string;\r\n    private reader: ClineDataReader;\r\n    private t: Translator;\r\n    \r\n    constructor(\r\n        workspaceRoot: string, \r\n        outputDir: string = '.llm-chat-history/history',\r\n        localeSetting?: LocaleSetting\r\n    ) {\r\n        this.workspaceRoot = workspaceRoot;\r\n        this.outputDir = path.join(workspaceRoot, outputDir);\r\n        this.t = createTranslator(localeSetting);\r\n        this.reader = new ClineDataReader(workspaceRoot, this.t);\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 启动监听\r\n     */\r\n    start(): void {\r\n        // 检查 Cline 目录是否存在\r\n        if (!this.reader.exists()) {\r\n            console.log('Cline directory not found, creating it...');\r\n            // 不显示错误，因为用户可能还没使用过 Cline\r\n            return;\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        // 1. 立即执行一次同步\r\n        this.syncNow();\r\n        \r\n        // 2. 监听 .cline 目录变化\r\n        const clineDir = path.join(this.workspaceRoot, '.cline');\r\n        this.watcher = chokidar.watch(clineDir, {\r\n            persistent: true,\r\n            ignoreInitial: true,\r\n            depth: 2 // 监听任务子目录\r\n        });\r\n        \r\n        this.watcher.on('add', () => this.scheduleSync());\r\n        this.watcher.on('change', () => this.scheduleSync());\r\n        \r\n        // 3. 定时轮询（兜底，每 2 分钟）\r\n        setInterval(() => {\r\n            this.syncNow();\r\n        }, 120000); // 2 分钟\r\n        \r\n        console.log('Cline watcher started');\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 停止监听\r\n     */\r\n    stop(): void {\r\n        if (this.watcher) {\r\n            this.watcher.close();\r\n        }\r\n        if (this.debounceTimer) {\r\n            clearTimeout(this.debounceTimer);\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 调度同步（防抖）\r\n     */\r\n    private scheduleSync(): void {\r\n        // 防抖：2 秒内只执行一次\r\n        if (this.debounceTimer) {\r\n            clearTimeout(this.debounceTimer);\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        this.debounceTimer = setTimeout(() => {\r\n            this.syncNow();\r\n        }, 2000);\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 立即同步\r\n     */\r\n    syncNow(): void {\r\n        const now = Date.now();\r\n        \r\n        // 避免过于频繁的同步\r\n        if (now - this.lastSync < 1000) {\r\n            return;\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        this.lastSync = now;\r\n        \r\n        this.performSync().catch(error => {\r\n            console.error('Cline sync failed:', error);\r\n        });\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 执行同步\r\n     */\r\n    private async performSync(): Promise<void> {\r\n        try {\r\n            // 获取所有任务\r\n            const tasks = this.reader.getAllTasks();\r\n            \r\n            console.log(`Found ${tasks.length} Cline tasks`);\r\n            \r\n            for (const { task, messages } of tasks) {\r\n                if (messages.length === 0) continue;\r\n                \r\n                // 生成 Markdown\r\n                const markdown = this.generateMarkdown(task, messages);\r\n                \r\n                // 保存\r\n                await this.save(task, markdown);\r\n            }\r\n        } catch (error) {\r\n            console.error('Failed to sync Cline tasks:', error);\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 生成 Markdown\r\n     */\r\n    private generateMarkdown(task: ClineTask, messages: any[]): string {\r\n        const lines: string[] = [];\r\n        \r\n        // 标题\r\n        lines.push(`# ${task.task || this.t('conversation.untitled')}`);\r\n        lines.push('');\r\n        \r\n        // 元数据\r\n        const createdAt = new Date(task.ts).toISOString();\r\n        lines.push(`**${this.t('conversation.created')}**: ${createdAt}`);\r\n        \r\n        const userCount = messages.filter(m => m.type === 'user').length;\r\n        const assistantCount = messages.filter(m => m.type === 'assistant').length;\r\n        lines.push(`**${this.t('conversation.messages')}**: ${messages.length} (${this.t('conversation.user')}: ${userCount}, ${this.t('conversation.assistant')}: ${assistantCount})`);\r\n        \r\n        lines.push(`**${this.t('conversation.taskId')}**: \\`${task.id}\\``);\r\n        lines.push(`**${this.t('conversation.cost')}**: $${task.totalCost.toFixed(4)}`);\r\n        lines.push(`**${this.t('conversation.tokens')}**: In: ${task.tokensIn}, Out: ${task.tokensOut}`);\r\n        lines.push('');\r\n        lines.push('---');\r\n        lines.push('');\r\n        \r\n        // 消息\r\n        let userIndex = 0;\r\n        let assistantIndex = 0;\r\n        \r\n        for (const msg of messages) {\r\n            if (msg.type === 'user') {\r\n                userIndex++;\r\n                lines.push(`## 💬 ${this.t('message.user')} #${userIndex}`);\r\n                lines.push('');\r\n                lines.push(`_${msg.timestamp}_`);\r\n                lines.push('');\r\n                lines.push(msg.text);\r\n                lines.push('');\r\n                lines.push('---');\r\n                lines.push('');\r\n            } else if (msg.type === 'assistant') {\r\n                assistantIndex++;\r\n                const modelLabel = msg.modelName ? ` (${msg.modelName})` : '';\r\n                lines.push(`## 🤖 ${this.t('message.assistant')} #${assistantIndex}${modelLabel}`);\r\n                lines.push('');\r\n                lines.push(`_${msg.timestamp}_`);\r\n                lines.push('');\r\n                \r\n                if (msg.text) {\r\n                    lines.push(msg.text);\r\n                    lines.push('');\r\n                }\r\n                \r\n                // 工具使用\r\n                if (msg.toolUses && msg.toolUses.length > 0) {\r\n                    lines.push(`**${this.t('tool.uses')}** (${msg.toolUses.length})`);\r\n                    lines.push('');\r\n                    \r\n                    for (const toolUse of msg.toolUses) {\r\n                        lines.push('<details>');\r\n                        lines.push(`<summary>🔧 **${toolUse.name}**</summary>`);\r\n                        lines.push('');\r\n                        lines.push(toolUse.markdown);\r\n                        lines.push('');\r\n                        lines.push('</details>');\r\n                        lines.push('');\r\n                    }\r\n                }\r\n                \r\n                lines.push('---');\r\n                lines.push('');\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        return lines.join('\\n');\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 保存任务到文件\r\n     */\r\n    private async save(task: ClineTask, markdown: string): Promise<void> {\r\n        // 确保目录存在\r\n        await fs.mkdir(this.outputDir, { recursive: true });\r\n        \r\n        // 生成文件名\r\n        const filename = this.generateFilename(task);\r\n        const filepath = path.join(this.outputDir, filename);\r\n        \r\n        // 检查是否需要更新\r\n        const shouldSave = await this.shouldSave(filepath, markdown);\r\n        \r\n        if (shouldSave) {\r\n            await fs.writeFile(filepath, markdown, 'utf-8');\r\n            console.log(`Saved Cline task: ${filename}`);\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 生成文件名\r\n     */\r\n    private generateFilename(task: ClineTask): string {\r\n        const date = new Date(task.ts);\r\n        const year = date.getUTCFullYear();\r\n        const month = String(date.getUTCMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0');\r\n        const day = String(date.getUTCDate()).padStart(2, '0');\r\n        const hour = String(date.getUTCHours()).padStart(2, '0');\r\n        const minute = String(date.getUTCMinutes()).padStart(2, '0');\r\n        \r\n        const timestamp = `${year}-${month}-${day}_${hour}-${minute}Z`;\r\n        const title = this.sanitizeTitle(task.task || 'untitled');\r\n        \r\n        return `${timestamp}-cline-${title}.md`;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 清理标题中的特殊字符\r\n     */\r\n    private sanitizeTitle(title: string): string {\r\n        return title\r\n            .replace(/[<>:\"/\\\\|?*]/g, '-')\r\n            .replace(/\\s+/g, '-')\r\n            .toLowerCase()\r\n            .substring(0, 50);\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 检查是否需要保存\r\n     */\r\n    private async shouldSave(filepath: string, newContent: string): {\n    console.log('LLM Chat History Extension activated');\n    \n    // 获取配置\n    const config = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory');\n    const autoSave =   "contentsAfterEdit": "/**\n * 扩展主入口文件\n */\n\nimport * as vscode from 'vscode';\nimport * as path from 'path';\nimport * as fs from 'fs';\nimport { DatabaseWatcher } from './database-watcher';\nimport { ClineWatcher } from './cline-watcher';\nimport { createTranslator } from './i18n';\n\n/**\n * 扩展激活时调用\n */\nexport function activate(context: vscode.ExtensionContext) {\n    console.log('LLM Chat History Extension activated');\n    \n    // 获取配置\n    const config = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory');\n    const autoSave = config.get<boolean>('autoSave', true);\n    const dataSource = config.get<string>('dataSource', 'cursor');\n    const outputDirectory = config.get<string>('outputDirectory', '.llm-chat-history/history');\n    const localeSetting = config.get<string>('locale', 'auto') as any;\n    const t = createTranslator(localeSetting);\n    \n    if (!autoSave) {\n        console.log('Auto-save disabled');\n        return;\n    }\n    \n    // 检查是否有打开的工作区\n    if (!vscode.workspace.workspaceFolders || vscode.workspace.workspaceFolders.length === 0) {\n        console.warn('No workspace folder open');\n        return;\n    }\n    \n    // 工作区路径（使用第一个工作区）\n    const workspaceRoot = vscode.workspace.workspaceFolders?.[0]?.uri.fsPath;\n    if (!workspaceRoot) {\n        console.warn('No workspace folder path resolved');\n        return;\n    }\n\n    // 根据数据源启动相应的监听器\n    let watcher: DatabaseWatcher | ClineWatcher;\n    \n    if (dataSource === 'cline') {\n        console.log('Using Cline data source');\n        watcher = new ClineWatcher(workspaceRoot, outputDirectory, localeSetting);\n        watcher.start();\n    } else {\n        console.log('Using Cursor data source');\n        // 获取数据库路径\n        const dbPath = getCursorDatabasePath();\n        \n        // 检查数据库是否存在\n        if (!fs.existsSync(dbPath)) {\n            console.warn('Cursor database not found:', dbPath);\n            vscode.window.showWarningMessage(\n                t('warning.dbNotFound')\n            );\n            return;\n        }\n        \n        watcher = new DatabaseWatcher(dbPath, workspaceRoot, localeSetting);\n        watcher.start();\n    }\n    \n    // 注册命令：手动保存\n    const saveCommand = vscode.commands.registerCommand(\n        'chatHistory.saveNow',\n        () => {\n            watcher.syncNow();\n            vscode.window.showInformationMessage(t('info.saved'));\n        }\n    );\n    \n    context.subscriptions.push(saveCommand, {\n        dispose: () => watcher.stop()\n    });\n    \n    console.log(`LLM Chat History Extension ready (${dataSource} mode)`);\n}\n\n/**\n * 扩展停用时调用\n */\nexport function deactivate() {\n    console.log('LLM Chat History Extension deactivated');\n}\n\n/**\n * 获取 Cursor 数据库路径\n */\nfunction getCursorDatabasePath(): string {\n    const platform = process.platform;\n    const homeDir = process.env.HOME || process.env.USERPROFILE || '';\n    \n    if (platform === 'win32') {\n        return path.join(\n            homeDir,\n            'AppData/Roaming/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb'\n        );\n    } else if (platform === 'darwin') {\n        return path.join(\n            homeDir,\n            'Library/Application Support/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb'\n        );\n    } else {\n        // Linux\n        return path.join(\n            homeDir,\n            '.config/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb'\n        );\n    }\n}\n\n\n"
}

resolveLocale(setting: LocaleSetting | undefined): Locale {\r\n    if (setting === 'en' || setting === 'zh') return setting;\r\n    const vscodeLang = vscode.env.language.toLowerCase();\r\n    if (vscodeLang.startsWith('zh')) return 'zh';\r\n    return 'en';\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport function createTranslator(setting?: LocaleSetting): Translator {\r\n    const locale = resolveLocale(setting);\r\n    return (key, params = {}) => {\r\n        const dict = messages[locale] || messages.en;\r\n        const template = dict[key] ?? messages.en[key] ?? key;\r\n        return template.replace(/\\{(\\w+)\\}/g, (_, k) => String(params[k] ?? ''));\r\n    };\r\n}\r\n\r\n"
}

  "contentsAfterEdit": "# LLM Chat History\n\nA VS Code extension that automatically saves your LLM chat history to Markdown files. Perfect for tracking AI conversations, building knowledge bases, and maintaining conversation archives.\n\n**Now supports both Cursor IDE and Cline extension!**\n\n## Features\n\n- ✅ **Automatic Monitoring**: Watches Cursor's database for changes\n- ✅ **Complete History**: Captures user messages, AI responses, and thinking processes\n- ✅ **Markdown Format**: Saves conversations in readable, version-control-friendly Markdown\n- ✅ **Timestamped Files**: Organizes files by date and conversation title\n- ✅ **Git Friendly**: Perfect for tracking AI conversations over time\n- ✅ **Multi-language**: UI and exported Markdown support English and Chinese\n\n## Installation\n\n### ⚠️ Before Installing\n\n**Please read the compatibility notice at the top of this page!**\n\nThis extension is currently in **beta** and only tested on:\n- ✅ Windows 10/11 + Cursor IDE\n\nIf you're using a different setup, it may not work correctly.\n\n### From VS Code Marketplace\n\n1. **Verify** you're using Cursor IDE on Windows\n2. Open Cursor\n3. Go to Extensions (Ctrl+Shift+X)\n4. Search for \"LLM Chat History\"\n5. Click Install\n\nThe extension will automatically configure itself upon installation.\n\n> **Note**: This extension uses `better-sqlite3`, a native module. The installation script automatically handles downloading the correct prebuilt binaries for Electron. If you encounter installation issues, run `npm run setup` manually.\n\n### From VSIX\n\n1. Download the `.vsix` file from releases\n2. In VS Code, go to Extensions view\n3. Click the `...` menu and select \"Install from VSIX...\"\n4. Select the downloaded file\n\n## Usage\n\nThe extension activates automatically when you open a workspace in Cursor.\n\n### Automatic Saving\n\nBy default, the extension automatically monitors your LLM chat history and saves it to `.llm-chat-history/history/` in your workspace root.\n\n### Manual Save\n\nYou can manually trigger a save by:\n1. Opening the Command Palette (Ctrl+Shift+P / Cmd+Shift+P)\n2. Running the command: \"LLMChatHistory: Save Chat History Now\"\n\n### Viewing History\n\nThe generated Markdown files are optimized for direct viewing:\n\n- **VS Code**: Open `.md` files directly with full Markdown preview support\n- **GitHub**: View with rich formatting and collapsible sections\n- **Obsidian/Notion**: Import for knowledge management\n- **Any Markdown Editor**: Standard Markdown with enhanced readability\n\n## Configuration\n\nConfigure the extension in your VS Code settings:\n\n```json\n{\n  \"chatHistory.autoSave\": true,\n  \"chatHistory.outputDirectory\": \".llm-chat-history/history\",\n  \"chatHistory.useUTC\": true,\n  \"chatHistory.locale\": \"auto\"\n}\n```\n\n### Settings\n\n- `chatHistory.autoSave` (default: `true`): Enable automatic saving of chat history\n- `chatHistory.outputDirectory` (default: `.llm-chat-history/history`): Directory to save history files\n- `chatHistory.useUTC` (default: `true`): Use UTC timezone for timestamps\n- `chatHistory.locale` (default: `auto`): Language for UI/Markdown (`auto`, `en`, `zh`)\n\n## Output Format\n\nConversations are saved as beautifully formatted Markdown files:\n\n```markdown\n# Conversation Title\n\n**Created**: 2025-12-23 10:30Z\n**Messages**: 4 (User: 2, Assistant: 2)\n**Session ID**: `abc-123`\n\n---\n\n## 💬 User #1\n\n_2025-12-23 10:30Z_\n\nUser's question here\n\n---\n\n## 🤖 Assistant #1 (claude-4.5-sonnet, Agent)\n\n_2025-12-23 10:31Z_\n\n<details>\n<summary><strong>💭 Thinking Process</strong></summary>\n\n> AI's internal thinking process\n> appears as a blockquote for easy reading\n\n</details>\n\nAI's response here\n\n**🔧 Tool Uses** (2)\n\n<details>\n<summary>🔍 **grep** — Grep for \"pattern\" in \"path\" • 5 matches</summary>\n\n**Args**\n\n```json\n{\n  \"pattern\": \"search term\",\n  \"path\": \"src/\"\n}\n```\n\n**Result**\n\n```json\n{\n  \"matches\": 5\n}\n```\n\n</details>\n\n---\n```\n\n### Key Features\n\n- ✨ **Clear Structure**: Hierarchical headings with emoji indicators\n- 📊 **Metadata**: Session info, message counts, timestamps\n- 💭 **Collapsible Sections**: Thinking processes and tool results fold away\n- 🎨 **Icon System**: Visual indicators for users (💬), assistants (🤖), tools (🔧), etc.\n- 📝 **Readable**: Optimized for direct viewing in any Markdown renderer\n- 🌐 **Bilingual**: All labels automatically localized to English or Chinese\n\n### File Naming\n\nFiles are named with the pattern: `YYYY-MM-DD_HH-MMZ-{title}.md`\n\nExample: `2025-12-23_10-30Z-implementing-chat-history.md`\n\n## System Requirements\n\n### ✅ Tested & Supported\n- **OS**: Windows 10/11\n- **Application**: Cursor IDE\n- **VS Code Version**: 1.93.0 or higher\n\n### ⚠️ Untested (Use at Your Own Risk)\n- macOS\n- Linux\n- Standard VS Code (without Cursor)\n- Other AI coding assistants (Cline, Continue, GitHub Copilot Chat, etc.)\n\n### Prerequisites\n- Active Cursor installation with chat history\n- Workspace folder must be open\n\n## Database Location\n\nThe extension reads from Cursor's SQLite database:\n\n- **Windows**: `%APPDATA%\\Roaming\\Cursor\\User\\globalStorage\\state.vscdb`\n- **macOS**: `~/Library/Application Support/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb`\n- **Linux**: `~/.config/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb`\n\n## Known Issues\n\n- The extension requires a workspace to be open\n- Database must be accessible (not locked by another process)\n- **Windows**: Native module installation is handled automatically\n\n## Roadmap\n\nWe are continuously improving this extension. Upcoming features include:\n\n### 🚀 Coming Soon\n- ☁️ **Cloud Sync**: Sync your chat history across all devices\n- 👥 **Team Collaboration**: Share and collaborate on conversations\n- 📊 **Advanced Analytics**: Insights and statistics about your AI usage\n- 🔍 **Advanced Search**: Full-text search across all conversations\n- 🏷️ **Tags & Organization**: Better ways to organize your history\n- 📤 **Export Options**: PDF, HTML, and more export formats\n\n## Pricing\n\n### Free Version (Current)\n- ✅ Unlimited local chat history saving\n- ✅ Markdown export\n- ✅ Multi-language support\n- ✅ Auto-save functionality\n\n### Pro Version (Coming Soon)\n- ☁️ Cloud sync across devices\n- 👥 Team collaboration features\n- 📊 Advanced analytics\n- 🎯 Priority support\n- 🔄 Auto-backup\n\nStay tuned for updates!\n\n## License\n\nThis software is proprietary and confidential. Unauthorized copying, distribution, \nmodification, or use is strictly prohibited.\n\n**Copyright (c) 2025 ClarkZhang (Solo). All rights reserved.**\n\n## Support\n\nNeed help or have feedback?\n\n- 📧 **Email**: 857867503@qq.com\n- 🌐 **GitHub**: https://github.com/Clark-zhang\n- 💬 **Feedback**: We'd love to hear from you!\n\n---\n\n**Note**: This extension is not officially affiliated with Cursor or Anysphere.\n\n\n"
}

  "contentsAfterEdit": "# LLM Chat History\n\nA VS Code extension that automatically saves your LLM chat history to Markdown files. Perfect for tracking AI conversations, building knowledge bases, and maintaining conversation archives.\n\n**Now supports both Cursor IDE and Cline extension!**\n\n## Features\n\n- ✅ **Dual Source Support**: Works with both Cursor IDE and Cline extension\n- ✅ **Automatic Monitoring**: Watches for chat history changes in real-time\n- ✅ **Complete History**: Captures user messages, AI responses, and thinking processes\n- ✅ **Tool Call Tracking**: Records all tool uses and their results\n- ✅ **Markdown Format**: Saves conversations in readable, version-control-friendly Markdown\n- ✅ **Timestamped Files**: Organizes files by date and conversation title\n- ✅ **Git Friendly**: Perfect for tracking AI conversations over time\n- ✅ **Multi-language**: UI and exported Markdown support English and Chinese\n\n## Installation\n\n### From VS Code Marketplace\n\n1. Open VS Code or Cursor\n2. Go to Extensions (Ctrl+Shift+X / Cmd+Shift+X)\n3. Search for \"LLM Chat History\"\n4. Click Install\n\nThe extension will automatically configure itself upon installation.\n\n> **Note**: For Cursor IDE support, this extension uses `better-sqlite3`, a native module. The installation script automatically handles downloading the correct prebuilt binaries for Electron. If you encounter installation issues, run `npm run setup` manually.\n\n### From VSIX\n\n1. Download the `.vsix` file from releases\n2. In VS Code, go to Extensions view\n3. Click the `...` menu and select \"Install from VSIX...\"\n4. Select the downloaded file\n\n## Usage\n\nThe extension activates automatically when you open a workspace in Cursor.\n\n### Automatic Saving\n\nBy default, the extension automatically monitors your LLM chat history and saves it to `.llm-chat-history/history/` in your workspace root.\n\n### Manual Save\n\nYou can manually trigger a save by:\n1. Opening the Command Palette (Ctrl+Shift+P / Cmd+Shift+P)\n2. Running the command: \"LLMChatHistory: Save Chat History Now\"\n\n### Viewing History\n\nThe generated Markdown files are optimized for direct viewing:\n\n- **VS Code**: Open `.md` files directly with full Markdown preview support\n- **GitHub**: View with rich formatting and collapsible sections\n- **Obsidian/Notion**: Import for knowledge management\n- **Any Markdown Editor**: Standard Markdown with enhanced readability\n\n## Configuration\n\nConfigure the extension in your VS Code settings:\n\n```json\n{\n  \"chatHistory.autoSave\": true,\n  \"chatHistory.outputDirectory\": \".llm-chat-history/history\",\n  \"chatHistory.useUTC\": true,\n  \"chatHistory.locale\": \"auto\"\n}\n```\n\n### Settings\n\n- `chatHistory.autoSave` (default: `true`): Enable automatic saving of chat history\n- `chatHistory.outputDirectory` (default: `.llm-chat-history/history`): Directory to save history files\n- `chatHistory.useUTC` (default: `true`): Use UTC timezone for timestamps\n- `chatHistory.locale` (default: `auto`): Language for UI/Markdown (`auto`, `en`, `zh`)\n\n## Output Format\n\nConversations are saved as beautifully formatted Markdown files:\n\n```markdown\n# Conversation Title\n\n**Created**: 2025-12-23 10:30Z\n**Messages**: 4 (User: 2, Assistant: 2)\n**Session ID**: `abc-123`\n\n---\n\n## 💬 User #1\n\n_2025-12-23 10:30Z_\n\nUser's question here\n\n---\n\n## 🤖 Assistant #1 (claude-4.5-sonnet, Agent)\n\n_2025-12-23 10:31Z_\n\n<details>\n<summary><strong>💭 Thinking Process</strong></summary>\n\n> AI's internal thinking process\n> appears as a blockquote for easy reading\n\n</details>\n\nAI's response here\n\n**🔧 Tool Uses** (2)\n\n<details>\n<summary>🔍 **grep** — Grep for \"pattern\" in \"path\" • 5 matches</summary>\n\n**Args**\n\n```json\n{\n  \"pattern\": \"search term\",\n  \"path\": \"src/\"\n}\n```\n\n**Result**\n\n```json\n{\n  \"matches\": 5\n}\n```\n\n</details>\n\n---\n```\n\n### Key Features\n\n- ✨ **Clear Structure**: Hierarchical headings with emoji indicators\n- 📊 **Metadata**: Session info, message counts, timestamps\n- 💭 **Collapsible Sections**: Thinking processes and tool results fold away\n- 🎨 **Icon System**: Visual indicators for users (💬), assistants (🤖), tools (🔧), etc.\n- 📝 **Readable**: Optimized for direct viewing in any Markdown renderer\n- 🌐 **Bilingual**: All labels automatically localized to English or Chinese\n\n### File Naming\n\nFiles are named with the pattern: `YYYY-MM-DD_HH-MMZ-{title}.md`\n\nExample: `2025-12-23_10-30Z-implementing-chat-history.md`\n\n## System Requirements\n\n### ✅ Tested & Supported\n- **OS**: Windows 10/11\n- **Application**: Cursor IDE\n- **VS Code Version**: 1.93.0 or higher\n\n### ⚠️ Untested (Use at Your Own Risk)\n- macOS\n- Linux\n- Standard VS Code (without Cursor)\n- Other AI coding assistants (Cline, Continue, GitHub Copilot Chat, etc.)\n\n### Prerequisites\n- Active Cursor installation with chat history\n- Workspace folder must be open\n\n## Database Location\n\nThe extension reads from Cursor's SQLite database:\n\n- **Windows**: `%APPDATA%\\Roaming\\Cursor\\User\\globalStorage\\state.vscdb`\n- **macOS**: `~/Library/Application Support/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb`\n- **Linux**: `~/.config/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb`\n\n## Known Issues\n\n- The extension requires a workspace to be open\n- Database must be accessible (not locked by another process)\n- **Windows**: Native module installation is handled automatically\n\n## Roadmap\n\nWe are continuously improving this extension. Upcoming features include:\n\n### 🚀 Coming Soon\n- ☁️ **Cloud Sync**: Sync your chat history across all devices\n- 👥 **Team Collaboration**: Share and collaborate on conversations\n- 📊 **Advanced Analytics**: Insights and statistics about your AI usage\n- 🔍 **Advanced Search**: Full-text search across all conversations\n- 🏷️ **Tags & Organization**: Better ways to organize your history\n- 📤 **Export Options**: PDF, HTML, and more export formats\n\n## Pricing\n\n### Free Version (Current)\n- ✅ Unlimited local chat history saving\n- ✅ Markdown export\n- ✅ Multi-language support\n- ✅ Auto-save functionality\n\n### Pro Version (Coming Soon)\n- ☁️ Cloud sync across devices\n- 👥 Team collaboration features\n- 📊 Advanced analytics\n- 🎯 Priority support\n- 🔄 Auto-backup\n\nStay tuned for updates!\n\n## License\n\nThis software is proprietary and confidential. Unauthorized copying, distribution, \nmodification, or use is strictly prohibited.\n\n**Copyright (c) 2025 ClarkZhang (Solo). All rights reserved.**\n\n## Support\n\nNeed help or have feedback?\n\n- 📧 **Email**: 857867503@qq.com\n- 🌐 **GitHub**: https://github.com/Clark-zhang\n- 💬 **Feedback**: We'd love to hear from you!\n\n---\n\n**Note**: This extension is not officially affiliated with Cursor or Anysphere.\n\n\n"

  "contentsAfterEdit": "# LLM Chat History\n\nA VS Code extension that automatically saves your LLM chat history to Markdown files. Perfect for tracking AI conversations, building knowledge bases, and maintaining conversation archives.\n\n**Now supports both Cursor IDE and Cline extension!**\n\n## Features\n\n- ✅ **Dual Source Support**: Works with both Cursor IDE and Cline extension\n- ✅ **Automatic Monitoring**: Watches for chat history changes in real-time\n- ✅ **Complete History**: Captures user messages, AI responses, and thinking processes\n- ✅ **Tool Call Tracking**: Records all tool uses and their results\n- ✅ **Markdown Format**: Saves conversations in readable, version-control-friendly Markdown\n- ✅ **Timestamped Files**: Organizes files by date and conversation title\n- ✅ **Git Friendly**: Perfect for tracking AI conversations over time\n- ✅ **Multi-language**: UI and exported Markdown support English and Chinese\n\n## Installation\n\n### From VS Code Marketplace\n\n1. Open VS Code or Cursor\n2. Go to Extensions (Ctrl+Shift+X / Cmd+Shift+X)\n3. Search for \"LLM Chat History\"\n4. Click Install\n\nThe extension will automatically configure itself upon installation.\n\n> **Note**: For Cursor IDE support, this extension uses `better-sqlite3`, a native module. The installation script automatically handles downloading the correct prebuilt binaries for Electron. If you encounter installation issues, run `npm run setup` manually.\n\n### From VSIX\n\n1. Download the `.vsix` file from releases\n2. In VS Code, go to Extensions view\n3. Click the `...` menu and select \"Install from VSIX...\"\n4. Select the downloaded file\n\n## Usage\n\nThe extension activates automatically when you open a workspace.\n\n### Choosing Your Data Source\n\nThe extension can work with either **Cursor IDE** or **Cline extension**:\n\n1. Open VS Code Settings (Ctrl+, / Cmd+,)\n2. Search for \"Chat History: Data Source\"\n3. Select either:\n   - **cursor** - For Cursor IDE (reads from Cursor's database)\n   - **cline** - For Cline extension (reads from `.cline` folder in workspace)\n\n### Automatic Saving\n\nBy default, the extension automatically monitors your LLM chat history and saves it to `.llm-chat-history/history/` in your workspace root.\n\n**For Cursor IDE:**\n- Monitors Cursor's SQLite database for changes\n- Filters conversations by current workspace\n\n**For Cline:**\n- Monitors the `.cline` folder in your workspace\n- Tracks all task history with cost and token information\n\n### Manual Save\n\nYou can manually trigger a save by:\n1. Opening the Command Palette (Ctrl+Shift+P / Cmd+Shift+P)\n2. Running the command: \"LLMChatHistory: Save Chat History Now\"\n\n### Viewing History\n\nThe generated Markdown files are optimized for direct viewing:\n\n- **VS Code**: Open `.md` files directly with full Markdown preview support\n- **GitHub**: View with rich formatting and collapsible sections\n- **Obsidian/Notion**: Import for knowledge management\n- **Any Markdown Editor**: Standard Markdown with enhanced readability\n\n## Configuration\n\nConfigure the extension in your VS Code settings:\n\n```json\n{\n  \"chatHistory.dataSource\": \"cursor\",\n  \"chatHistory.autoSave\": true,\n  \"chatHistory.outputDirectory\": \".llm-chat-history/history\",\n  \"chatHistory.useUTC\": true,\n  \"chatHistory.locale\": \"auto\"\n}\n```\n\n### Settings\n\n- `chatHistory.dataSource` (default: `cursor`): Select data source - `cursor` for Cursor IDE or `cline` for Cline extension\n- `chatHistory.autoSave` (default: `true`): Enable automatic saving of chat history\n- `chatHistory.outputDirectory` (default: `.llm-chat-history/history`): Directory to save history files\n- `chatHistory.useUTC` (default: `true`): Use UTC timezone for timestamps\n- `chatHistory.locale` (default: `auto`): Language for UI/Markdown (`auto`, `en`, `zh`)\n\n## Output Format\n\nConversations are saved as beautifully formatted Markdown files:\n\n```markdown\n# Conversation Title\n\n**Created**: 2025-12-23 10:30Z\n**Messages**: 4 (User: 2, Assistant: 2)\n**Session ID**: `abc-123`\n\n---\n\n## 💬 User #1\n\n_2025-12-23 10:30Z_\n\nUser's question here\n\n---\n\n## 🤖 Assistant #1 (claude-4.5-sonnet, Agent)\n\n_2025-12-23 10:31Z_\n\n<details>\n<summary><strong>💭 Thinking Process</strong></summary>\n\n> AI's internal thinking process\n> appears as a blockquote for easy reading\n\n</details>\n\nAI's response here\n\n**🔧 Tool Uses** (2)\n\n<details>\n<summary>🔍 **grep** — Grep for \"pattern\" in \"path\" • 5 matches</summary>\n\n**Args**\n\n```json\n{\n  \"pattern\": \"search term\",\n  \"path\": \"src/\"\n}\n```\n\n**Result**\n\n```json\n{\n  \"matches\": 5\n}\n```\n\n</details>\n\n---\n```\n\n### Key Features\n\n- ✨ **Clear Structure**: Hierarchical headings with emoji indicators\n- 📊 **Metadata**: Session info, message counts, timestamps\n- 💭 **Collapsible Sections**: Thinking processes and tool results fold away\n- 🎨 **Icon System**: Visual indicators for users (💬), assistants (🤖), tools (🔧), etc.\n- 📝 **Readable**: Optimized for direct viewing in any Markdown renderer\n- 🌐 **Bilingual**: All labels automatically localized to English or Chinese\n\n### File Naming\n\nFiles are named with the pattern: `YYYY-MM-DD_HH-MMZ-{title}.md`\n\nExample: `2025-12-23_10-30Z-implementing-chat-history.md`\n\n## System Requirements\n\n### ✅ Tested & Supported\n- **OS**: Windows 10/11\n- **Application**: Cursor IDE\n- **VS Code Version**: 1.93.0 or higher\n\n### ⚠️ Untested (Use at Your Own Risk)\n- macOS\n- Linux\n- Standard VS Code (without Cursor)\n- Other AI coding assistants (Cline, Continue, GitHub Copilot Chat, etc.)\n\n### Prerequisites\n- Active Cursor installation with chat history\n- Workspace folder must be open\n\n## Database Location\n\nThe extension reads from Cursor's SQLite database:\n\n- **Windows**: `%APPDATA%\\Roaming\\Cursor\\User\\globalStorage\\state.vscdb`\n- **macOS**: `~/Library/Application Support/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb`\n- **Linux**: `~/.config/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb`\n\n## Known Issues\n\n- The extension requires a workspace to be open\n- Database must be accessible (not locked by another process)\n- **Windows**: Native module installation is handled automatically\n\n## Roadmap\n\nWe are continuously improving this extension. Upcoming features include:\n\n### 🚀 Coming Soon\n- ☁️ **Cloud Sync**: Sync your chat history across all devices\n- 👥 **Team Collaboration**: Share and collaborate on conversations\n- 📊 **Advanced Analytics**: Insights and statistics about your AI usage\n- 🔍 **Advanced Search**: Full-text search across all conversations\n- 🏷️ **Tags & Organization**: Better ways to organize your history\n- 📤 **Export Options**: PDF, HTML, and more export formats\n\n## Pricing\n\n### Free Version (Current)\n- ✅ Unlimited local chat history saving\n- ✅ Markdown export\n- ✅ Multi-language support\n- ✅ Auto-save functionality\n\n### Pro Version (Coming Soon)\n- ☁️ Cloud sync across devices\n- 👥 Team collaboration features\n- 📊 Advanced analytics\n- 🎯 Priority support\n- 🔄 Auto-backup\n\nStay tuned for updates!\n\n## License\n\nThis software is proprietary and confidential. Unauthorized copying, distribution, \nmodification, or use is strictly prohibited.\n\n**Copyright (c) 2025 ClarkZhang (Solo). All rights reserved.**\n\n## Support\n\nNeed help or have feedback?\n\n- 📧 **Email**: 857867503@qq.com\n- 🌐 **GitHub**: https://github.com/Clark-zhang\n- 💬 **Feedback**: We'd love to hear from you!\n\n---\n\n**Note**: This extension is not officially affiliated with Cursor or Anysphere.\n\n\n"
}
```

{
  "file_path": "CLINE_SETUP.md",
  "contents": "# Setting Up LLM Chat History for Cline\n\nThis guide will help you configure the LLM Chat History extension to work with Cline.\n\n## Prerequisites\n\n1. **Install Cline Extension**\n   - Open VS Code\n   - Go to Extensions (Ctrl+Shift+X / Cmd+Shift+X)\n   - Search for \"Cline\"\n   - Install the Cline extension\n\n2. **Install LLM Chat History Extension**\n   - Search for \"LLM Chat History\"\n   - Install this extension\n\n## Configuration Steps\n\n### Step 1: Open Settings\n\n1. Press `Ctrl+,` (Windows/Linux) or `Cmd+,` (Mac) to open Settings\n2. Or go to: File → Preferences → Settings\n\n### Step 2: Configure Data Source\n\n1. In the search bar, type: `chatHistory.dataSource`\n2. Change the value from `cursor` to `cline`\n\nAlternatively, you can edit your `settings.json` directly:\n\n```json\n{\n  \"chatHistory.dataSource\": \"cline\",\n  \"chatHistory.autoSave\": true,\n  \"chatHistory.outputDirectory\": \".llm-chat-history/history\"\n}\n```\n\n### Step 3: Use Cline\n\n1. Open a workspace/folder in VS Code\n2. Use Cline to have conversations with AI\n3. The extension will automatically save your chat history to `.llm-chat-history/history/`\n\n## How It Works\n\n### Data Source\n\nCline stores task history in the `.cline` folder within your workspace:\n\n```\nyour-workspace/\n├── .cline/\n│   ├── task-id-1/\n│   │   ├── task.json\n│   │   └── api_conversation_history.json\n│   ├── task-id-2/\n│   │   ├── task.json\n│   │   └── api_conversation_history.json\n│   └── ...\n└── .llm-chat-history/\n    └── history/\n        ├── 2025-12-23_10-30Z-cline-your-task-name.md\n        └── ...\n```\n\n### What Gets Saved\n\nThe extension captures:\n\n- ✅ User messages\n- ✅ AI responses\n- ✅ Tool calls and results\n- ✅ Task metadata (cost, tokens, timestamps)\n- ✅ Complete conversation flow\n\n### File Naming\n\nFiles are named with the pattern:\n\n```\nYYYY-MM-DD_HH-MMZ-cline-{task-name}.md\n```\n\nExample: `2025-12-23_10-30Z-cline-implement-login-feature.md`\n\n## Output Format\n\nCline conversations are saved with rich metadata:\n\n```markdown\n# Your Task Name\n\n**Created**: 2025-12-23 10:30:00Z\n**Messages**: 8 (User: 4, Assistant: 4)\n**Task ID**: `abc-123-def`\n**Cost**: $0.0234\n**Tokens**: In: 1234, Out: 5678\n\n---\n\n## 💬 User #1\n\n_2025-12-23 10:30:00Z_\n\nYour message here...\n\n---\n\n## 🤖 Assistant #1 (claude-3.5-sonnet)\n\n_2025-12-23 10:30:15Z_\n\nAI response here...\n\n**🔧 Tool Uses** (2)\n\n<details>\n<summary>🔧 **read_file**</summary>\n\n**Tool Name**: read_file\n\n**Arguments**\n```json\n{\n  \"path\": \"src/app.ts\"\n}\n```\n\n</details>\n\n---\n```\n\n## Switching Between Cursor and Cline\n\nYou can easily switch between Cursor and Cline modes:\n\n1. Open Settings (`Ctrl+,` / `Cmd+,`)\n2. Search for `chatHistory.dataSource`\n3. Change between:\n   - `cursor` - For Cursor IDE\n   - `cline` - For Cline extension\n\nThe extension will automatically start monitoring the appropriate data source.\n\n## Troubleshooting\n\n### No history files being created\n\n**Check:**\n1. Is the data source set to `cline`?\n2. Have you used Cline at least once in this workspace?\n3. Does the `.cline` folder exist in your workspace?\n\n### Files are empty or incomplete\n\n**Check:**\n1. Make sure Cline has completed at least one conversation\n2. Check the Output panel (View → Output) and select \"LLM Chat History\" from the dropdown\n3. Look for any error messages\n\n### Wrong data source\n\nIf you see a warning about \"Cursor database not found\" but you're using Cline:\n- Change `chatHistory.dataSource` to `cline` in settings\n\n## Support\n\nFor issues or questions:\n- 📧 Email: 857867503@qq.com\n- 🌐 GitHub: https://github.com/Clark-zhang\n\n---\n\n**Note**: This extension is not officially affiliated with Cline or Anthropic.\n"
}
